growth_records.cite: Dethlefsen et al. Differences in codon bias cannot explain differences in translational power among microbes. BMC Bioinformatics (2005). DOI:10.1186/1471-2105-6-3. [PMC546186]
growth_records.notes: Table 1. Paper reports temperature-corrected-to-37C specific growth rate (col3) = 0.29 hr-1 (=ln2/generation time) with actual culture temp 30C and correction factor 1.80 (footnote e: factor applied to actual to obtain corrected). Actual measured mu = 0.29/1.80 = 0.161 hr-1; td=ln2/0.161=4.30 h. rrn copy#=1. Value cited from reference [39]; not a primary measurement of this paper. Not a GEM/MFA paper; no uptake/secretion or medium reported.
